name: SEMTECH CORP
business: Semtech Corp. is a provider of high-performance semiconductors for data center networking, IoT connectivity, and cellular infrastructure, and also offers IoT systems and connectivity services. Its products are sold into infrastructure, high-end consumer, and industrial end markets to OEMs, IoT device makers, enterprises, and solution providers.
sellsTo: Infrastructure (data centers, PON, base stations, optical networks)
Industrial (IoT applications, smart utilities, medical, automotive)

exposures.sentence: We are a leading provider of high-performance semiconductors powering data center networking, Internet of Things ("IoT") connectivity and cellular infrastructure solutions

Our portfolio of optical and copper connectivity solutions continue to address the demand for greater bandwidth and higher performance, while using less power by our global hyper-scale data center customers.

The growing deployment of on-device AI in IoT applications further strengthens this opportunity: edge AI architectures transmit processed insights rather than raw sensor data, dramatically reducing bandwidth requirements and making the long-range, low-power characteristics of LoRa an ideal complement to AI-enabled IoT devices across industrial, security, smart city applications and more.
A growing concentration of demand in AI-related semiconductors may increase our exposure to cyclical industry trends and competitive pressures, which may adversely affect our results of operations.

We supply cellular wireless devices and provide services in the wireless communications and information technology industries, enabling connectivity for IoT solutions through cellular and short-range wireless technologies.

We design, develop, manufacture and market a portfolio of high-performance analog and mixed-signal semiconductors and advanced algorithms, as well as wireless semiconductors, connectivity modules, gateways, routers and connected services for IoT.
Our unique sensing technology enables proximity sensing, force sensing, and advanced user interface solutions for mobile, consumer, computing and automotive products.

catalysts.sentence: On March 3, 2026, we completed the acquisition of HieFo Corporation in an all-cash transaction representing a total purchase consideration of approximately $34.0 million
